description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: To correct a clear error, the Core Facilitator may directly update an Active Data document at any time. Prior to taking such action, the Core Facilitator should notify the respective Responsible Party charged with maintaining the Active Data document.
However, if the error or issue is not clearly evident, the Active Data document must be updated in accordance with the established procedure defined in [A.1.
